summary: Great performance marred by a faulty left channel in the soundboard recording
review: The concert itself is praised as an excellent show, but the recording suffers from a serious left‑side audio problem that makes this version unlistenable. The source appears to be a soundboard tape, yet the channel issue outweighs the musical strengths for most listeners.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; it rates the show highly but flags a severe recording defect, leading to an overall moderate rating after weighting performance (70%) and audio quality (30%).

recording_quality.technical_notes: Left channel is corrupted or missing; causes imbalance/muddiness that renders the recording unusable despite otherwise decent source.
